expectations.evidence: File is markdown with headings (##, ###), bullet lists, and tables — no structured entity/value/command/event blocks

Many entities across 6 bounded contexts: Clinic, VetProfile, ClinicSchedule, AvailabilityPattern, SlotOverride, Appointment, PetOwner, Pet, PetMedicalRecord, MedicalEntry, NotificationSchedule, PlannedNotification, ClinicReviewCollection, Review

Aggregates labeled in each context: Clinic (Aggregate Root), Appointment (Aggregate Root), PetOwner (Aggregate Root), Pet (Aggregate Root), PetMedicalRecord (Aggregate Root), ClinicSchedule (Aggregate Root), NotificationSchedule (Aggregate Root), ClinicReviewCollection (Aggregate Root)

No state machines defined — the file has no state machine section, lifecycle diagram, or transition table. Statuses are listed as enumerations (AppointmentStatus, ClinicStatus) but no lifecycle transitions are specified
No invariants section. Business rules are listed as 'Key Business Rules' in prose but not formalized as invariants with names and enforcement semantics
No error events or error paths defined. Domain events are listed (e.g. AppointmentCancelled) but no failure/error events or precondition failure paths are documented
